articles.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces Daybreak security tools including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber for vulnerability detection.

articles.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
articles.summary: OpenAI launches Patch the Planet to help open-source maintainers identify and fix security vulnerabilities.

articles.title: Mastering Agentic Techniques: AI Agent Reinforcement Learning
articles.summary: NVIDIA explores reinforcement learning techniques for training and aligning AI agents effectively.

articles.title: Inside NVIDIA Halos for Robotics: A Full-Stack Functional Safety System for Physical AI
articles.summary: NVIDIA introduces Halos, a safety system for autonomous robots operating alongside humans in physical spaces.

articles.title: Enable Real-Time AI for High-Speed Data Acquisition with DAQIRI
articles.summary: NVIDIA presents DAQIRI for real-time AI processing in high-speed scientific data acquisition workflows.

articles.title: CCCL Runtime: A Modern C++ Runtime for CUDA
articles.summary: NVIDIA releases CCCL Runtime, modernizing C++ abstractions for efficient CUDA and Python development.

articles.title: Run NVIDIA Nemotron and OpenAI GPT OSS models on Amazon Bedrock in AWS GovCloud (US)
articles.summary: AWS GovCloud now supports NVIDIA Nemotron and OpenAI GPT open-weight models for government applications.

articles.title: How Inscribe uses Amazon Bedrock to stop document fraud in seconds
articles.summary: Inscribe deploys agentic AI via Amazon Bedrock to detect financial document fraud in under 90 seconds.

articles.title: Building a serverless A2A gateway for agent discovery, routing, and access control
articles.summary: AWS demonstrates building a serverless agent-to-agent gateway for multi-agent discovery and routing.

articles.title: Structured memory filtering with metadata in AgentCore Memory
articles.summary: AWS explores metadata-driven memory filtering for multi-agent and multi-tenant AI architectures.

articles.title: HippoRAG: Neurobiologically inspired RAG using Amazon Bedrock, Amazon Neptune, and personalized PageRank
articles.summary: AWS implements HippoRAG, a neurobiologically-inspired retrieval-augmented generation system for enterprise applications.

articles.title: Simplify model selection in Amazon Bedrock with the open source Model Profiler
articles.summary: AWS releases open source Model Profiler tool for simplified model selection and metadata aggregation.

articles.title: Accelerate protein design with BoltzGen on Amazon SageMaker AI
articles.summary: AWS demonstrates deploying BoltzGen for scalable protein design research with iterative workflow optimization.

articles.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
articles.summary: Hugging Face and Cerebras enable real-time voice AI capabilities with Gemma 4 integration.

articles.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
articles.summary: PaddlePaddle releases PP-OCRv6, a scalable multilingual optical character recognition model.

articles.title: After spooking Trump into safety testing, Anthropic AI models get global release
articles.summary: Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models receive global release following US safety testing clearance.

articles.title: LLMs are stuck in a groupthink groove. This startup is trying to get them out.
articles.summary: A startup tackles LLM bias and diversity issues in model outputs and reasoning patterns.

articles.title: Three things to watch amid Anthropic's latest feud with the government
articles.summary: MIT Technology Review analyzes key regulatory and policy implications of Anthropic's government tensions.

articles.title: $130 billion in data center projects blocked by protests so far this year
articles.summary: Significant AI data center projects face environmental and community opposition delaying infrastructure expansion.
